    S

    Sage - Class in jobs
    Represents the Sage job and its specific choices
    Sage() - Constructor for class jobs.Sage
    Sets the name and description
    Samurai - Class in jobs
    Represents the Samurai job and its specific choices
    Samurai() - Constructor for class jobs.Samurai
    Sets the name and description
    SAS - Enum constant in enum class races.Garlean.GarleanTitles
     
    Scholar - Class in jobs
    Represents the Scholar job and its specific choices
    Scholar() - Constructor for class jobs.Scholar
    Sets the name and the description
    SEA_WOLVES - Enum constant in enum class races.Roegadyn.RoegadynClan
     
    SEEKERS_OF_THE_SUN - Enum constant in enum class races.Miqote.MiqoteClan
     
    setGarleanTitle(Garlean.GarleanTitles) - Method in class races.Garlean
    Sets the Garlean title that is assigned to the character
    setJob(Job) - Method in class main.Character
    Sets the job chosen by the player
    setName(String) - Method in class main.Character
    Sets the name of the character
    setRace(Race) - Method in class main.Character
    Sets the race of the character being created
    setSex(Character.Sex) - Method in class main.Character
    Sets the sex of the character
    startingSpells() - Method in class jobs.Job
    Loads a list of spells and cantrips from two files
    StatAssignmentTest - Class in tests.java.main
     
    StatAssignmentTest() - Constructor for class tests.java.main.StatAssignmentTest
     
    statRoll() - Static method in class main.DiceRoller
    Rolls four six-sided dice, drops the lowest roll, and returns the sum
    STRENGTH - Enum constant in enum class races.Race.Stat
     
    Summoner - Class in jobs
    Represents the Summoner job and its specific choices
    Summoner() - Constructor for class jobs.Summoner
    Sets the name and description
